name: codex-mdfy
description: Archive Codex session transcripts into dated Markdown files with one-time shell-based installation.

interface.longDescription: Render Codex CLI or IDE transcripts into Markdown files stored under a user-selected YYYY/MM/DD archive tree after one-time installation.
defaultPrompt: Archive this Codex session into Markdown and show the output path.
Explain how to install the session archiver skill and hooks for this clone.
Adjust the Markdown archive format for my Codex transcripts.
